title: Dreamcore & Weirdcore Symbols: Copy & Paste 👁 🌈 ⋆ Surreal Aesthetic
meta_description: Dreamcore and weirdcore symbols — surreal eyes 👁, rainbows 🌈, glitch blocks, doors, and sleepcore combos for liminal posts. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Surreal eyes, endless doors, static glitch blocks, and sleepy skies for liminal-space aesthetics. Click any symbol or combo to copy it instantly.
intro: Dreamcore and weirdcore are sibling internet aesthetics built on the surreal logic of dreams — nostalgic skies, watching eyes, doors to nowhere, and slightly-off familiar objects. These dreamcore and weirdcore symbols translate that mood into copyable text: 👁 eyes, 🌈 rainbows, 📺 old televisions, shade blocks for static, and a sleepcore set for softer, drowsier edits. Use them in Discord statuses, Tumblr headers, TikTok captions, and YouTube descriptions, or grab a whole surreal combo below.

sections.intro: Doors, holes, mirrors, and old TVs — familiar objects placed where they should not be.
